mapper.sql: A.NAUDIT_DHCP_MST_SEQ, A.SSVC_LINE_TYPE_CD, A.NLVL_MST_SEQ, A.STOP_NODE_CD , A.SOFFICE_CD, A.SL3_NESCODE, A.SL3_EQUIP_ALIAS, A.SL3_MSTIP , A.SSAID, A.SLLNUM, A.NIP_BLOCK_CNT, A.NIP_CNT , A.NMAX_PEAK, A.NMIN_PEAK, A.NAUDIT_VALUE, A.NOPIMIZE_VALUE , A.NDHCP_MIN_IP_BLOCK_CNT_OVER, A.NDHCP_MIN_IP_CNT_OVER, A.NDHCP_RANGE_DAYS, A.BAUDIT_YN , A.BOPTIMIZE_YN, A.DAUDIT_CHECK_DT, A.DAUDIT_PROCESS_DT, A.NOPTIMIZE_CHECK_DT , A.DOPTIMIZE_PROCESS_DT, A.SUSE_STATUS_CD, A.BFALG, A.SCOMMENT , A.DCREATE_DT, A.SCREATE_ID, A.DMODIFY_DT, A.SMODIFY_ID

A.NAUDIT_DHCP_MST_SEQ, A.SSVC_LINE_TYPE_CD, A.NLVL_MST_SEQ, A.STOP_NODE_CD , A.SOFFICE_CD, A.SL3_NESCODE, A.SL3_EQUIP_ALIAS, A.SL3_MSTIP , A.SSAID, A.SLLNUM, A.NIP_BLOCK_CNT, A.NIP_CNT , A.NMAX_PEAK, A.NMIN_PEAK, A.NAUDIT_VALUE, A.NOPIMIZE_VALUE , A.NDHCP_MIN_IP_BLOCK_CNT_OVER, A.NDHCP_MIN_IP_CNT_OVER, A.NDHCP_RANGE_DAYS, A.BAUDIT_YN , A.BOPTIMIZE_YN, A.DAUDIT_CHECK_DT, A.DAUDIT_PROCESS_DT, A.NOPTIMIZE_CHECK_DT , A.DOPTIMIZE_PROCESS_DT, A.SUSE_STATUS_CD, A.BFALG, A.SCOMMENT , A.DCREATE_DT, A.SCREATE_ID, A.DMODIFY_DT, A.SMODIFY_ID , A.SSVC_LINE_TYPE_NM , A.SSVC_GROUP_NM , A.STOP_NODE_NM , A.SOFFICE_NM , A.BAUDIT_NM , A.BOPTIMIZE_NM , A.BFALG_NM, A.SSVC_OBJ_NM ,

, B.SSVC_LINE_TYPE_NM , E.SLVL_NM AS SSVC_GROUP_NM , F.SLVL_NM AS SSVC_OBJ_NM , G.SLVL_NM AS SOFFICE_NM , H.SLVL_NM AS STOP_NODE_NM , (CASE A.BAUDIT_YN WHEN 'R' THEN '미발생' WHEN 'Y' THEN '발생' ELSE '해제' END) AS BAUDIT_NM , (CASE A.BOPTIMIZE_YN WHEN 'R' THEN '미발생' WHEN 'Y' THEN '발생' ELSE '해제' END) AS BOPTIMIZE_NM , (CASE A.BFALG WHEN 'Y' THEN '자동' ELSE '수동' END) AS BFALG_NM
, MST.TB_SVC_LINE_TYPE_CD B , MST.TB_LVL_MST C , MST.TB_SVC_LINE_TYPE_CD D , MST.TB_LVL_CD E , MST.TB_LVL_CD F , MST.TB_LVL_CD G , MST.TB_LVL_CD H

choose.when:
ORDER BY A.NIP_BLOCK_CNT
ASC
DESC
ASC

ORDER BY A.NIP_CNT
ASC
DESC
ASC

ORDER BY A.NMAX_PEAK
ASC
DESC
ASC

ORDER BY A.NMIN_PEAK
ASC
DESC
ASC

ORDER BY A.DMODIFY_DT
ASC
DESC
ASC
